title: machaerium nyctitans var. scleroxylon
intro: Machaerium nyctitans var. scleroxylon, also known as the "Night-blooming Guanacaste," is a plant species that belongs to the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Machaerium nyctitans var. scleroxylon include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a tea from the bark or using it in traditional medicine, but further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
